def solve(grid, x, y, k)
  sub_rows = []
  (x ... x + k).each do |i|
    sub_rows << grid[i][y...y + k]

  sub_rows.reverse!
  (0 ... k).each do |i|

    grid[original_row][y...y + k] = sub_rows[i]
  end
  grid
end

def solve(grid, x, y, k)
  copied_grid = grid.map(&:dup)
  rows = (x ... x + k).to_a
  submatrix_rows = rows.map { |i| copied_grid[i][y...y + k] }

  rows.each_with_index do |row_idx, i|
    copied_grid[row_idx][y...y + k] = reversed_submatrix_rows[i]
  end
  copied_grid
end
